Track all notable changes, new features,: Track all notable changes, new features, and bug fixes in MBC CQRS Serverless releases.
All notable changes to MBC CQRS Serverle: All notable changes to MBC CQRS Serverless are documented here. This project follows [Semantic Versioning](https://semver.org/) and [Conventional Commits](https://conventionalcommits.org/).
Repository Read-Your-Writes (RYW) improv: Repository Read-Your-Writes (RYW) improvements â€” proactively purge stale RYW sessions when the data table catches up to or surpasses the session version, eliminating "stale override" reads
`getItem`: when `existing.version >= ses: `getItem`: when `existing.version >= session.version`, the session is purged in the background and persisted data is returned directly (skipping the unnecessary command-table read)
`listItemsByPk`: synchronized sessions a: `listItemsByPk`: synchronized sessions are cleaned up in-place during the merge loop
`listItems` (RDS path): per-session chec: `listItems` (RDS path): per-session checks are now parallelized via `Promise.all`, eliminating sequential N+1 latency
New optional `mergeOptions.getVersion` l: New optional `mergeOptions.getVersion` lets callers skip the extra DynamoDB GetItem when the existing RDS row already proves caught-up
`SessionService.delete()` and `DynamoDbS: `SessionService.delete()` and `DynamoDbService.deleteItem()` added; both safe for fire-and-forget use
Backward-compatible: `getVersion` is opt: Backward-compatible: `getVersion` is optional; projects with `RYW_SESSION_TTL_MINUTES` unset are unaffected
Add AP021 anti-pattern detector â€” `Eve: Add AP021 anti-pattern detector â€” `Event Emit Directly After publishAsync in CommandService` (Severity: High)
Recommendation: emit events from `IDataS: Recommendation: emit events from `IDataSyncHandler.up()`/`down()` instead, since the data table is populated asynchronously via DynamoDB Streams after `publishAsync`
Add cross-reference table mapping detect: Add cross-reference table mapping detector AP codes (`analyze.ts`) to skill-doc AP codes (`skills/mbc-review/SKILL.md`) â€” the two systems use independent numbering and only AP016â€“AP019 and AP021 share codes
Detector output now annotates each hit w: Detector output now annotates each hit with its corresponding skill-doc AP code, e.g. `AP005: Hardcoded Tenant (skill-doc: AP002)`
`mbc-migrate` skill: added v1.2.5 and v1: `mbc-migrate` skill: added v1.2.5 and v1.2.6 sections with migration matrix entries
`mbc-debug` skill: added troubleshooting: `mbc-debug` skill: added troubleshooting entry for the (intentional) early RYW session purge in v1.2.6
`server.ts` was hardcoding the package v: `server.ts` was hardcoding the package version, which silently drifted on every `lerna version` bump. Now read at runtime from `package.json`
Refactor ZIP import processing â€” move: Refactor ZIP import processing â€” move ZIP job handling directly into `ImportService`, removing the separate `ZipImportQueueEventHandler`
`ZipImportQueueEventHandler` has been re: `ZipImportQueueEventHandler` has been removed; ZIP import jobs are now processed directly within `ImportService`
`ImportEventHandler` now skips SQS publi: `ImportEventHandler` now skips SQS publishing for `ZIP_MASTER_JOB` events
Improved error handling and logging for: Improved error handling and logging for ZIP processing
Add AP016â€“AP020 anti-pattern detectors: Add AP016â€“AP020 anti-pattern detectors to `mbc_check_anti_patterns` tool (total: 20 patterns)
AP016: Missing Error Logging Before Reth: AP016: Missing Error Logging Before Rethrow (High)
AP017: Incorrect Attribute Merging on Pa: AP017: Incorrect Attribute Merging on Partial Update (High)
AP019: Missing Pagination in List Querie: AP019: Missing Pagination in List Queries (High)
Update `mbc-migrate` and `mbc-debug` ski: Update `mbc-migrate` and `mbc-debug` skills with v1.1.x and v1.2.x breaking change guidance
Fix Head-of-Line Blocking (Poison Pill): Fix Head-of-Line Blocking (Poison Pill) in `CsvBatchProcessor` by implementing Smart Retry pattern
Previously, a persistent validation erro: Previously, a persistent validation error on the first row caused the entire batch to crash immediately
Now, each row is processed independently: Now, each row is processed independently; errors are collected and a single aggregated error is thrown after the full batch is processed
Valid rows are saved successfully; faile: Valid rows are saved successfully; failed rows trigger SQS retry; already-succeeded rows are skipped on retry via EQUAL comparison (idempotency maintained)
Fix `ImportQueueEventHandler` passing ra: Fix `ImportQueueEventHandler` passing raw SQS payload instead of parsed `importEvent` to `SingleImportProcessor`
`singleImportProcessor.process()` now re: `singleImportProcessor.process()` now receives `event.importEvent` (parsed, rich object) instead of `event.payload` (raw SQS payload)
Add `SqsService` and `SqsClientFactory`: Add `SqsService` and `SqsClientFactory` for SQS message operations
`sendMessage()` â€” send a single messag: `sendMessage()` â€” send a single message to an SQS queue
`sendMessageBatch()` â€” send up to 10 m: `sendMessageBatch()` â€” send up to 10 messages in a single API call
`receiveMessages()` â€” receive messages: `receiveMessages()` â€” receive messages with configurable `MaxNumberOfMessages` (default: 10) and `WaitTimeSeconds` (default: 0)
`deleteMessage()` â€” acknowledge and de: `deleteMessage()` â€” acknowledge and delete a single processed message
`deleteMessageBatch()` â€” delete up to: `deleteMessageBatch()` â€” delete up to 10 messages in a single API call
`SqsService` is registered in `QueueModu: `SqsService` is registered in `QueueModule` (global) and injectable across the application
Supports `MessageSystemAttributeNames` f: Supports `MessageSystemAttributeNames` for receiving system attributes (deprecated `AttributeNames` not exposed)
Refactor `SnsClientFactory` to use a sin: Refactor `SnsClientFactory` to use a singleton `SNSClient` instance
Previously cached a separate client per: Previously cached a separate client per topic ARN; now a single instance is shared across all publish calls
`publishSync()` and `publishPartialUpdat: `publishSync()` and `publishPartialUpdateSync()` now return `null` when the command is not dirty (no-op)
Return type changes from `Promise<Comman: Return type changes from `Promise<CommandModel>` to `Promise<CommandModel | null>`
Matches the existing behavior of `publis: Matches the existing behavior of `publishAsync()` and `publishPartialUpdateAsync()`
Migration: add a null check before acces: Migration: add a null check before accessing any property on the result
After `publishAsync`, subsequent reads b: After `publishAsync`, subsequent reads by the same user now return pending command data before the DynamoDB Stream sync completes
Opt-in: set `RYW_SESSION_TTL_MINUTES` en: Opt-in: set `RYW_SESSION_TTL_MINUTES` environment variable to enable (e.g. `5`)
New `Repository` class exported from `Co: New `Repository` class exported from `CommandModule` / `@mbc-cqrs-serverless/core` â€” wraps `DataService` with RYW merge for `getItem`, `listItemsByPk`, `listItems`
No effect when `RYW_SESSION_TTL_MINUTES`: No effect when `RYW_SESSION_TTL_MINUTES` is unset â€” zero impact on existing projects
Add AP013 and AP014 anti-pattern detecto: Add AP013 and AP014 anti-pattern detectors for v1.2.0 breaking changes
AP013: detects `publishSync`/`publishPar: AP013: detects `publishSync`/`publishPartialUpdateSync` result used without null check
Fix import status handling for ZIP orche: Fix import status handling for ZIP orchestrator
`ImportStatusHandler` now sends task suc: `ImportStatusHandler` now sends task success with `importJobStatus` when the job fails
`ZipImportSfnEventHandler` aggregates CS: `ZipImportSfnEventHandler` aggregates CSV task failure counts and adjusts final job status
Implement v2 batch processing architectu: Implement v2 batch processing architecture for high-throughput CSV imports
Replace per-row `import_tmp` writes with: Replace per-row `import_tmp` writes with direct in-Lambda command publishing, eliminating Hot Partition bottlenecks
Distributed Map now configured with `Max: Distributed Map now configured with `MaxItemsPerBatch: 100` and `MaxConcurrency: 50` for significantly higher throughput
New `finalize_parent_job` state aggregat: New `finalize_parent_job` state aggregates batch summaries and writes final job status in a single DynamoDB `UpdateItem` call
Remove per-row atomic counter updates fr: Remove per-row atomic counter updates from `CommandFinishedHandler`, eliminating DynamoDB throttling at scale
Add `ImportPublishMode` enum (`SYNC` / `: Add `ImportPublishMode` enum (`SYNC` / `ASYNC`) to `ImportEntityProfile` for per-entity publish mode configuration
Add empty `processingResults` guard: job: Add empty `processingResults` guard: job is marked `FAILED` if no batch results are received
CSV import no longer provides real-time: CSV import no longer provides real-time row-level progress tracking
`processedRows`, `succeededRows`, `faile: `processedRows`, `succeededRows`, `failedRows` counters are now aggregated once when Step Functions execution completes
Individual CSV rows are no longer writte: Individual CSV rows are no longer written to the `import_tmp` DynamoDB table
The `import-csv` state machine requires: The `import-csv` state machine requires a new `finalize_parent_job` state and `resultPath: '$.processingResults'` â€” CDK and `serverless.yml` must be updated together with this package
Add SYNC/ASYNC routing tests for `Import: Add SYNC/ASYNC routing tests for `ImportQueueEventHandler` (6 test cases covering EQUAL/NOT_EXIST/CHANGED Ă— SYNC/ASYNC + fallback)
Add batch aggregation tests (1,000 + 500: Add batch aggregation tests (1,000 + 500 rows, COMPLETED and FAILED scenarios)
Restore audit trail and history parity f: Restore audit trail and history parity for `publishSync`
`publishSync` now writes an immutable ev: `publishSync` now writes an immutable event to the Command table with `status: 'publish_sync:STARTED'` and `syncMode: 'SYNC'`
History table is now populated by `publi: History table is now populated by `publishSync`, matching the async Step Functions pipeline
Command lifecycle follows `publish_sync:: Command lifecycle follows `publish_sync:STARTED` â†’ `finish:FINISHED` (or `publish_sync:FAILED` on error)
Ported `isNotCommandDirty` early-return: Ported `isNotCommandDirty` early-return optimization from `publishAsync` â€” returns `null` when no changes detected
DynamoDB Stream filter updated to exclud: DynamoDB Stream filter updated to exclude `syncMode=SYNC` records, preventing Step Functions double-execution
`DefaultEventFactory` also filters `sync: `DefaultEventFactory` also filters `syncMode=SYNC` records for local development environments
Add comprehensive tests for `publishSync: Add comprehensive tests for `publishSync` audit trail and history parity
Fix CSV import Distributed Map state res: Fix CSV import Distributed Map state result exceeding 256KB limit
Set `resultPath: DISCARD` on Distributed: Set `resultPath: DISCARD` on Distributed Map to prevent child execution results from being aggregated into state data
Remove `MapResult` dependency from `CsvI: Remove `MapResult` dependency from `CsvImportSfnEventHandler`, use `countCsvRows()` from S3 instead
Add error handling for cases where the S: Add error handling for cases where the S3 stream is not readable
Switch to npm OIDC trusted publishing, r: Switch to npm OIDC trusted publishing, removing dependency on `NPM_TOKEN` secret
Upgrade lerna from v8 to v9 for built-in: Upgrade lerna from v8 to v9 for built-in OIDC support
Add `id-token: write` permission to publ: Add `id-token: write` permission to publish job
Add lockfile sync step for Node 22+ comp: Add lockfile sync step for Node 22+ compatibility
Add comprehensive tests for `CsvImportSf: Add comprehensive tests for `CsvImportSfnEventHandler` finalize_parent_job logic
Test COMPLETED status when all rows succ: Test COMPLETED status when all rows succeed
Test no status update when processing is: Test no status update when processing is incomplete
Test error handling when S3 stream is no: Test error handling when S3 stream is not readable
Add built-in upsert methods for master s: Add built-in upsert methods for master settings and data
Automatically creates new records, updat: Automatically creates new records, updates changed records, and skips unchanged records
Single endpoint that handles both settin: Single endpoint that handles both settings and data items
Items routed by presence of `settingCode: Items routed by presence of `settingCode` field
Preserves original input order in respon: Preserves original input order in response
Add `@ArrayMaxSize(100)` validation to a: Add `@ArrayMaxSize(100)` validation to all bulk DTOs
Add tenant code validation to individual: Add tenant code validation to individual bulk endpoints (`/api/master-setting/bulk`, `/api/master-data/bulk`)
Fix `checkVersion` error message using h: Fix `checkVersion` error message using hardcoded value instead of actual `commandVersion`
Fix `seq === 0` being treated as falsy i: Fix `seq === 0` being treated as falsy in `createSetting` by changing to null check (`seq == null`)
Fix DTO mutation in `createSetting` by c: Fix DTO mutation in `createSetting` by cloning attributes before modifying seq
Add comprehensive unit tests for MasterB: Add comprehensive unit tests for MasterBulkController (8 test cases)
Add unit tests for MasterDataService ups: Add unit tests for MasterDataService upsert and upsertBulk methods
Add unit tests for MasterSettingService: Add unit tests for MasterSettingService upsertTenantSetting and upsertBulk methods
Add integration tests for master data an: Add integration tests for master data and setting upsert scenarios
The `import_tmp` table definition was mi: The `import_tmp` table definition was missing from CLI templates, causing `npm run offline:sls` to fail
The `serverless.yml` references `LOCAL_D: The `serverless.yml` references `LOCAL_DDB_IMPORT_TMP_STREAM` environment variable, which requires the table to be created during migration
See [Common Issues](/docs/common-issues#: See [Common Issues](/docs/common-issues#missing-import-tmp-table) for workaround if using older versions
This change affects partition key format: This change affects partition key format: `TENANT#COMMON` â†’ `TENANT#common`
**Migration required:** Existing data wi: **Migration required:** Existing data with `TENANT#COMMON` partition keys needs to be migrated
Add tenant code normalization for case-i: Add tenant code normalization for case-insensitive matching
Tenant codes are now automatically norma: Tenant codes are now automatically normalized to lowercase
All DynamoDB operations use normalized t: All DynamoDB operations use normalized tenant codes for consistency
Add `normalizeTenantCode()` utility func: Add `normalizeTenantCode()` utility function for explicit normalization
Add `isCommonTenant()` utility function: Add `isCommonTenant()` utility function for common tenant detection
Add EmailTags support for AWS SES email: Add EmailTags support for AWS SES email categorization and filtering
Tags are passed to SES for email categor: Tags are passed to SES for email categorization and tracking
Add extensible tenant verification in Ro: Add extensible tenant verification in RolesGuard
Add npm registry version check for skill: Add npm registry version check for skill updates
Fetch latest version from npm registry i: Fetch latest version from npm registry instead of local package.json
Restrict tenant code header override to: Restrict tenant code header override to system admin only
Previously, users without `custom:tenant: Previously, users without `custom:tenant` Cognito attribute could specify any tenant via header
Now only users with global `system_admin: Now only users with global `system_admin` role can override tenant code via `x-tenant-code` header
Regular users must have `custom:tenant`: Regular users must have `custom:tenant` set in Cognito
Fix `TENANT_COMMON` constant usage in Ma: Fix `TENANT_COMMON` constant usage in MasterSettingService and MasterDataService
Previously hardcoded `'COMMON'` strings: Previously hardcoded `'COMMON'` strings are now using `SettingTypeEnum.TENANT_COMMON`
Ensures consistent partition key generat: Ensures consistent partition key generation across the framework
Add comprehensive tests for TenantServic: Add comprehensive tests for TenantService methods
Add tenant code normalization tests (70+: Add tenant code normalization tests (70+ test cases)
Add tenant normalization command tests (: Add tenant normalization command tests (30+ test cases)
Add comprehensive dependency integration: Add comprehensive dependency integration tests (3400+ tests)
AWS SDK integration tests (DynamoDB, S3,: AWS SDK integration tests (DynamoDB, S3, SNS, SQS, Step Functions, SES)
NestJS behavior tests (decorators, confi: NestJS behavior tests (decorators, config, DI, Swagger)
Add migration guide for v1.1.0 tenant co: Add migration guide for v1.1.0 tenant code changes
Add configurable local service ports via: Add configurable local service ports via environment variables
Support for `LOCAL_HTTP_PORT`, `LOCAL_DY: Support for `LOCAL_HTTP_PORT`, `LOCAL_DYNAMODB_PORT`, `LOCAL_RDS_PORT`, and other port variables
Allows users to resolve port conflicts w: Allows users to resolve port conflicts with other services
Configuration is automatically applied t: Configuration is automatically applied to Docker Compose, Serverless Offline, and trigger scripts
Update `diff` package from 4.0.2 to 4.0.4 for security fix
Update `lodash` package from 4.17.21 to: Update `lodash` package from 4.17.21 to 4.17.23 for prototype pollution fix
Enhanced inline template email with adva: Enhanced inline template email with advanced variable substitution
Support for nested property access in te: Support for nested property access in template variables (e.g., user.profile.name in double-brace placeholders)
Support for Unicode/Japanese keys in tem: Support for Unicode/Japanese keys in template variables
Whitespace trimming inside placeholders: Whitespace trimming inside placeholders so spaces around the variable name are ignored
Improved local development fallback for: Improved local development fallback for template compilation
Add Claude Code Skills for guided develo: Add Claude Code Skills for guided development assistance
`/mbc-generate`: Generate boilerplate co: `/mbc-generate`: Generate boilerplate code (modules, services, controllers, DTOs, handlers)

Skills are distributed via npm package a: Skills are distributed via npm package and can be installed to `~/.claude/skills/` or `.claude/skills/`
Add `mbc install-skills` command for eas: Add `mbc install-skills` command for easy skills installation
Install skills to personal directory (`~: Install skills to personal directory (`~/.claude/skills/`) or project directory (`.claude/skills/`)

Affected packages: core, directory, mast: Affected packages: core, directory, master, task, ui-setting

Add code analysis tools for AI-assisted: Add code analysis tools for AI-assisted development
`mbc_check_anti_patterns`: Detect common: `mbc_check_anti_patterns`: Detect common anti-patterns in code with severity levels
`mbc_explain_code`: Analyze and explain: `mbc_explain_code`: Analyze and explain code in MBC CQRS context
Limit regex match range to prevent false: Limit regex match range to prevent false positives
Add error handling for file reading and: Add error handling for file reading and JSON parsing
Add 18 unit tests for analyze tools: Add 18 unit tests for analyze tools
Fix security vulnerabilities in dependen: Fix security vulnerabilities in dependencies: qs, express, body-parser
Add ZIP finalization hooks support to Im: Add ZIP finalization hooks support to ImportModule
New `IZipFinalizationHook` interface for: New `IZipFinalizationHook` interface for custom post-import processing
Hooks receive `ZipFinalizationContext` w: Hooks receive `ZipFinalizationContext` with results, status, and execution input
Fix Step Functions CSV handler always se: Fix Step Functions CSV handler always setting COMPLETED status regardless of child job failures
Fixed `CsvImportSfnEventHandler.finalize: Fixed `CsvImportSfnEventHandler.finalizeParentJob()` to correctly set status to FAILED when any child job fails
Fixed `CsvImportSfnEventHandler` in `csv: Fixed `CsvImportSfnEventHandler` in `csv_loader` state to correctly set status when early finalization occurs with failures
Previously, the ternary operator was inc: Previously, the ternary operator was incorrectly returning COMPLETED for both cases: `failedRows > 0 ? COMPLETED : COMPLETED`
Now correctly returns FAILED when failed: Now correctly returns FAILED when failedRows > 0: `failedRows > 0 ? FAILED : COMPLETED`
This bug caused Step Functions to report: This bug caused Step Functions to report SUCCESS even when child import jobs failed
Fix master job status not updating to FA: Fix master job status not updating to FAILED when child import jobs fail
Previously, when a child import job fail: Previously, when a child import job failed with errors like `ConditionalCheckFailedException`, the master job status remained `PROCESSING` indefinitely
Fixed `incrementParentJobCounters` to co: Fixed `incrementParentJobCounters` to correctly set master job status to `FAILED` when any child job fails (was always setting to `COMPLETED`)
Fixed `ImportQueueEventHandler.handleImp: Fixed `ImportQueueEventHandler.handleImport` to call `incrementParentJobCounters` on error, ensuring parent counters are updated
Removed `throw error` in error handler t: Removed `throw error` in error handler to prevent Lambda crashes and allow proper status propagation
This fix completes the Step Functions er: This fix completes the Step Functions error handling started in v1.0.18, ensuring `SendTaskFailure` is properly triggered
Add `SendTaskFailure` support to `Import: Add `SendTaskFailure` support to `ImportStatusHandler` for proper Step Functions error handling
Previously, when an import job failed, t: Previously, when an import job failed, the Step Function would wait indefinitely because only `SendTaskSuccess` was implemented
Now the handler properly sends `SendTask: Now the handler properly sends `SendTaskFailure` when a job fails, allowing Step Functions to handle errors correctly
Handler now processes both `COMPLETED` a: Handler now processes both `COMPLETED` and `FAILED` statuses for CSV import jobs
Fix `masterTypeCode` comparison in `Mast: Fix `masterTypeCode` comparison in `MasterDataService.search()` - Changed from partial match (`contains`) to exact match for `settingCode` search parameter
Stabilize AbstractRunner tests by removi: Stabilize AbstractRunner tests by removing setTimeout to fix flaky CI failures
